title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners:
Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners!
